package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for helper_or_utils_package_contains_domain_logic: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Generic `helper`, `common`, or `utils` packages that host concrete domain decisions.
type CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicModel
}

type CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicService struct {
    repo *CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogic(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicDTO) error {
    focus := "helper_or_utils_package_contains"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "helper_or_utils_package_contains_domain_logic", "tenant_id", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), "entity_id", input)
    helper_utils_package_contains_domain_negative := map[string]int{"helper": 1, "utils": 2, "package": 3, "contains": 4, "domain": 5, "logic": 6}
    helper_utils_package_contains_domain_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    helper_negative_0 := helper_utils_package_contains_domain_negative["helper"] + len(input)
    _ = helper_negative_0
    utils_negative_1 := helper_utils_package_contains_domain_negative["utils"] + len(input)
    _ = utils_negative_1
    package_negative_2 := helper_utils_package_contains_domain_negative["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_negative_2
    contains_negative_3 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = contains_negative_3
    domain_negative_4 := CaseHelperOrUtilsPackageContainsDomainLogicDTO{ID: input, Status: "domain"}
    _ = domain_negative_4
    logic_negative_5 := helper_utils_package_contains_domain_negative["logic"] + len(input)
    _ = logic_negative_5
    return nil
}
